expectations.text: The review is written in Chinese
expectations.evidence: Entire report is in Chinese, e.g. '先扣款再校验、且更新非原子，控制流顺序错误' and '公共边界全部使用 `any`，契约完全缺失'.

expectations.text: Flags the `any` typing and silent `?? {}` fallback as a boundary/type-contract issue
expectations.evidence: Finding 3 '公共边界全部使用 `any`，契约完全缺失' covers the any typing, and Finding 6 '`findOrder(...) ?? {}` 静默吞掉「订单不存在」' explicitly frames the `?? {}` fallback as a 边界与隐式回退 (boundary) issue.

expectations.text: Flags at least one additional structural issue (mode-based branching with duplicated coupon logic, the thin findOrder wrapper, the duplicated formatMoney, or the non-atomic charge/update)
expectations.evidence: Flags all: Finding 1 非原子 charge/update, Finding 2 duplicated formatMoney, Finding 4 mode 分支 with duplicated 合计/优惠 logic, Finding 5 thin findOrder pass-through wrapper.

expectations.text: Findings use stable IDs such as CQ-001
expectations.evidence: Findings are numbered '### 1.', '### 2.', ... '### 6.' Plain numeric headings, not CQ-001-style stable IDs (zero CQ- identifiers present).
Read-only static review; no claim of modifying the file, and Scope limitations confirms '这是静态评审，未运行类型检查或测试（本次为只读审查...）'.
